tags.name: `mc-switch`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display a switch with optional labels, hints, and error messages.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-switch-group, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer, mc-notification
Alternative component names: Toggle Switch, Toggle Button, On/Off Switch

Events:

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired when mc-switch is clicked.

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<boolean>`} - Fired when mc-switch in checked/unckecked.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-switch is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-switch is going out of focus.

  * `input` {`CustomEvent<string | boolean | unknown[] | null>`} - 

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-switch.

Attributes:

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the switch.

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets switch in the `readonly` state.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets select in the `disabled` state.

  * `name` {`string`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element.

  * `value` {`string | undefined`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a `form` element.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets switch in the `checked` state.

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

Properties:

  * `button` {`HTMLButtonElement | null | undefined`} - 

  * `focused` {`boolean`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the switch.

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets switch in the `readonly` state.

  * `handleClick` - 

  * `focus` - Sets the focus to the switch

  * `blur` - Takes focus out of the switch

  * `click` - Click on the switch

  * `change` - Change the switch.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets select in the `disabled` state.

  * `_onMouseDown` - 

  * `cachedValue` {`string | boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `_value` {`string | boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `name` {`string`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element.

  * `value` {`string | undefined`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a `form` element.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets switch in the `checked` state.

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - 

  * `controlType` {`string`} - 

  * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.description:
